title: taraxacum leutianum
intro: Taraxacum leutianum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion genus, characterized by its smaller size and more delicate appearance compared to its more common counterpart. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum leutianum include its ability to act as a diuretic, reducing fluid retention, and its anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in soothing digestive issues. The health benefits associated with Taraxacum leutianum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, improve liver function, and support overall digestive health. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum leutianum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
